_comment: OPT-IN backfill v2 (WITH MEALS / CALORIES) for the May 24–Jun 15, 2026 gap. SUPERSEDES the earlier micros-only backfill — paste this into System tab → 'MERGE FOOD LOG' (it's safe to paste on top of the previous merge; the per-date merge is non-destructive and these are full day objects). WHY THIS EXISTS: the app derives a day's calories ONLY by summing item.kcal across meals[], so the earlier file's empty meals:[] made every backfilled day show 0 kcal. This file adds an itemized meal per day so calories (and protein) populate. SOURCING: Jun 8/14/15 use the Brain Dump's exact itemized calorie tables. Every other day with a recorded day-total (May 24,26,28,29,30,31, Jun 1,4,5,6,7) is itemized to sum to that source total, with per-item protein distributed to match the day's protein figure. NO-TOTAL DAYS (Jun 2, 8, 9–13): the source gave a food list + micronutrients but never a calorie or protein total, so calories here are GOOD-FAITH ESTIMATES from the actual foods eaten (clearly flagged in each meal's note), and per-item protein is intentionally omitted so the protein total stays blank rather than understated. INTENTIONALLY ABSENT (no source data at all): May 20–23, 25, 27, Jun 3, 16, 17. DESIGN NOTE: item names are deliberately phrased so none exactly match the app's FOOD_MICROS auto-lookup table — this keeps the carefully-set day-level `nutrients` micronutrient overrides authoritative and prevents accidental double-counting. Source: brain-dump.

2026-05-24.label: May 24 — reconstructed micros (Brain Dump estimate, not itemized) 🧬

meals.label: Reconstructed log 🧬
meals.note: Under-fueled active-recovery day (~500–600 kcal logged). Itemized to the source day-total.

health.notes: Significantly under-fueled active-recovery day, ~500-600 kcal logged: 1 leftover slice Costco pizza, 1 tbsp powdered parmesan, 1 oat chocolate-chip cookie. Missed the morning Greek yogurt anchor — protein crashed to single digits.

Sodium/calcium/iron were only described qualitatively (High/Excellent/Solid) in the source — no number given, so omitted here.

items.name: Field Roast smoked apple sage sausage

meals.note: Exact itemization from the source 'Complete Final Log' table (~2,238 kcal / ~94.3g protein). The 180g Kodubale packet alone was ~966 kcal.

health.notes: ~2,238 kcal, ~94.3g protein, ~101.5g fat, ~237.6g carbs, ~22.6g fiber. Sourdough/cheese pizza bread, Orgain protein shake w/ banana + berries + oat milk, an entire 180g packet of Adukale Kayi Kodubale (~966 kcal alone), Field Roast sausage, Bitchin' sauce, oat cookie, peanut butter. This day had two micronutrient passes — values below prefer the later 'Complete Final Log' deep-dive numbers where they overlap (sodium/calcium/iron/potassium/magnesium/vitamin A/C/D/folate); zinc_mg and omega3_g are carried over from the earlier pass since the deep-dive table didn't cover them.
